name: rippling
description: Access Rippling HR data — employees, departments, teams, and leave requests — via the Rippling platform API

envVars.name: RIPPLING_API_TOKEN
envVars.description: Rippling API token (Bearer). Issued for custom API integrations by your Rippling admin, or as an app access token for approved Rippling apps

tools.name: List Employees
tools.description: List active employees in the Rippling company with pagination

limit.description: Number of employees to return per page (max 100)

offset.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

tools.name: Get Employee
tools.description: Get a single employee's record (title, department, work location, employment type) by ID

limit.description: Number of departments to return per page (max 100)

offset.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

limit.description: Number of teams to return per page (max 100)

offset.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

tools.name: List Leave Requests
tools.description: List leave (time off) requests with optional status and date filtering

status.description: Filter by request status, e.g. PENDING, APPROVED, or REJECTED

startDate.description: Only requests starting on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

endDate.description: Only requests ending on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: Process Leave Request
tools.description: Approve or decline a pending leave request

leaveRequestId.description: ID of the leave request to process (from List Leave Requests)

action.description: Decision to apply: approve or decline

prompts.title: Headcount overview
prompts.prompt: List employees from Rippling and summarize headcount by department and team.

prompts.title: Who is out
prompts.prompt: Check Rippling for approved leave requests overlapping this week and tell me who is out of office.

prompts.title: Employee lookup
prompts.prompt: Look up an employee I specify in Rippling and summarize their role, department, and work location.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Rippling API setup

steps.title: Confirm API access
steps.description: Rippling API access is not open by default. Customers can obtain an API token for custom integrations through their Rippling account (API access may require a plan add-on); software vendors register an app at https://developer.rippling.com and receive tokens once approved.

steps.title: Get your API token
steps.description: As a Rippling admin, create or retrieve your company API token from the Rippling admin console (Settings → Company API / custom integration settings), or use the access token issued for your approved app integration.

steps.title: Store the token
steps.description: Add RIPPLING_API_TOKEN=<your token> to your .env file. Requests are sent to https://api.rippling.com/platform/api with an Authorization: Bearer header.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Employees tool. The token's scopes (granted at creation/approval) determine which resources are readable; a 403 means the token lacks the scope for that endpoint.

notes: This connector targets the token-authenticated platform API (api.rippling.com/platform/api); Rippling's newer REST API for App Shop partners uses OAuth app installs and is not covered here
List endpoints paginate with limit/offset (recommended max limit 100)
Returned data is limited by the scopes granted to your token or app
